mnemonics: FROST Exam: Focus on Filters, Remember Object detection, Study Segmentation, Test Transformations.
keyPoints: Image Segmentation and Clustering algorithms (e.g., K-Means, Mean-Shift).
Feature Detection and Description (e.g., SIFT, SURF, ORB).
Object Detection methods (e.g., Viola-Jones, HOG + SVM).
commonMistakes: Confusing image segmentation with object detection (grouping pixels vs. locating objects).
Mixing up the properties of different feature descriptors like SIFT (scale-invariant) and ORB (oriented FAST).
